name: Version Migration for Findify Liquid Components
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can upgrade your Shopify theme to the latest version of Merchandising Cloud Liquid components while preserving your customizations through a systematic migration process. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This upgrade approach helps ensure you benefit from new features, performance improvements, and bug fixes without losing the unique modifications you've made to match your brand."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Following a structured migration workflow with proper version control and testing helps minimize risk when updating your Merchandising Cloud implementation. By backing up your current theme, carefully reviewing changes, and testing before publishing, you can confidently upgrade to access improved functionality while maintaining the custom look and feel you've developed for your store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This guide outlines the steps to upgrade your Shopify theme to the latest version of Findify Liquid components while retaining your customizations."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "1. Prepare Your Environment"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To ensure a smooth migration:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Set up Theme Kit:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Use Shopify\u2019s Theme Kit for seamless theme development.\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://shopify.dev/docs/themes/tools/theme-kit/getting-started#macos", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Getting Started with Theme Kit"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Install Git:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Ensure Git is installed for version control.\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2/Getting-Started-Installing-Git", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Git - Installing Git"}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "2. Back Up Your Current Theme"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before migrating, back up your existing theme to safeguard your customizations:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Open your terminal."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Bashgit add *git rm --cached config.ymlgit commit -m \"Backup current theme before Findify migration\""}, {"text": "Note: Exclude\u00a0", "italic": true}, {"text": "config.yml", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0from version control as it contains sensitive environment-specific information.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Confirm the backup in the Source Control sidebar of Visual Studio Code. The only untracked file should be "}, {"text": "config.yml", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/S4PLZSVWCAAP/07ab82832b8e5fcee2c3dbb770dcd059336ed60697b1acbf0668ac4fbcfa3922-untitled-20.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/S4PLZSVWCAAP/07ab82832b8e5fcee2c3dbb770dcd059336ed60697b1acbf0668ac4fbcfa3922-untitled-20.png", "name": "07ab82832b8e5fcee2c3dbb770dcd059336ed60697b1acbf0668ac4fbcfa3922-Untitled_20.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 160226, "width": 1630, "height": 869, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FS4PLZSVWCAAP%2F07ab82832b8e5fcee2c3dbb770dcd059336ed60697b1acbf0668ac4fbcfa3922-untitled-20.png", "mediaID": 1057, "dateInserted": "2025-10-06T21:07:51+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "3. Download the Latest Findify Components"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Findify versions follow the format\u00a0"}, {"text": "YYYY-MM.RR", "code": true}, {"text": ":"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "YYYY:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Year of the release."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "MM:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Month of the release (major updates occur quarterly: January, April, July, and October)."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "RR:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Release number within the quarter (e.g., 01, 02, 03, etc.)."}]}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Visit the\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://github.com/findify/findify-liquid-components/tags", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Findify Liquid Components Repository"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Select the latest version."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Download and extract the ZIP file."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "4. Update Your Theme"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Integrate the updated Findify components into your Shopify theme while retaining customizations:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In Visual Studio Code, open your theme folder."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Pro Tip:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Overwrite existing files only if you haven't customized them."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Assets", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Sections", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Snippets", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L1FCHYWXE1EG/be4fe9542b10eb8afcccb834f43f6213acfcc697c029af2b7197cd6d0f0c0904-untitled-21.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L1FCHYWXE1EG/be4fe9542b10eb8afcccb834f43f6213acfcc697c029af2b7197cd6d0f0c0904-untitled-21.png", "name": "be4fe9542b10eb8afcccb834f43f6213acfcc697c029af2b7197cd6d0f0c0904-Untitled_21.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 141262, "width": 834, "height": 619, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FL1FCHYWXE1EG%2Fbe4fe9542b10eb8afcccb834f43f6213acfcc697c029af2b7197cd6d0f0c0904-untitled-21.png", "mediaID": 1058, "dateInserted": "2025-10-06T21:09:59+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "5. Review and Merge Changes"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the Source Control sidebar in Visual Studio Code."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/MAEA52BAUGWC/29696469351ef4aa9ab15630fe47d253a3bf175aa5ef65babb7059d508295499-untitled-22.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/MAEA52BAUGWC/29696469351ef4aa9ab15630fe47d253a3bf175aa5ef65babb7059d508295499-untitled-22.png", "name": "29696469351ef4aa9ab15630fe47d253a3bf175aa5ef65babb7059d508295499-Untitled_22.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 478568, "width": 1734, "height": 994, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FMAEA52BAUGWC%2F29696469351ef4aa9ab15630fe47d253a3bf175aa5ef65babb7059d508295499-untitled-22.png", "mediaID": 1059, "dateInserted": "2025-10-06T21:10:15+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Compare the newly added files against your current theme to identify changes:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Keep Customizations:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0If a file contains heavy customizations, create a separate snippet or isolate your UI logic to avoid overwriting."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Use Release Notes:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Refer to the release notes on the\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://github.com/findify/findify-liquid-components/releases", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Findify repository"}]}, {"text": "\u00a0for detailed information on updates."}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "6. Test the Integration"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before publishing the updated theme:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Preview your store in Shopify to verify that all Findify features are functioning as expected."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Test heavily customized components to ensure they are still compatible with the new version."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "7. Publish and Push Changes"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once satisfied with the updates:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Bashgit add *git commit -m \"Upgrade to Findify Liquid Components [version]\"git push"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Merge changes into your live theme using Shopify CLI or the Shopify Admin interface."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By following this migration guide, you can safely upgrade to the latest Findify Liquid components while maintaining your store\u2019s unique look and feel. If you encounter issues, refer to the release notes or contact\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:YourFriends@Findify.io", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "YourFriends@Findify .io"}]}, {"text": "\u00a0for assistance."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
